form.formComment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at Manawatu (21.67) in a Class 3. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at Manawatu (21.67) in a Class 3. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Manawatu (21.54) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 4.5 lengths third. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 17 starts. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.60) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 4 length fifth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.60) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 4 length fifth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards and shifted up, failed.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Manawatu over 375m in 21.11 last start, beating Tuahiwi. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Manawatu over 375m in 21.11 last start, beating Tuahiwi. In the mix.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Manawatu over 457m. Last start finished last over 457m at Manawatu beaten 5 lengths (26.04) behind Beam in a Class 2/3 on April 2. Has a superb 17.1 best time at this course and distance. Key player and should go well.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a head at this track (17.74) beating All The Best in a Class 2 on March 30. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 2 over 375m at Manawatu in a Class 3. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 2 over 375m at Manawatu in a Class 3. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (21.50) at Manawatu in a Class 3, finishing fifth and beaten 5.5 lengths. Has never missed the frame from eight starts from the draw, including a win. With a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 660m at Manawatu. Looks a place chance at best.
